description: Reproduction workflow skill for generating admin setup + test execution plans. Template-driven, stateless - AI fills the template with user-provided data.

USER_LEVEL_CREATE.menu: Name Config > User Level Setup > User Level Control
USER_LEVEL_CREATE.action: Create new or find existing User Level matching reported config

MENU_PERMISSION.menu: Name Config > User Level Setup > Access Menu Permission
MENU_PERMISSION.action: Assign menu permissions to the User Level

EMPLOYEE_SETUP.action: Find or create employee, assign User Level

LOGIN_TEST.action: Logout admin, login as test employee, verify result

template:
### Reproduction Workflow Rules
You are generating a REVISED investigation plan based on tester-verified data.

## INPUT DATA FORMAT
You will receive:
1. Original checklist (tester-approved checks only)
2. User Level info from the live system
3. Employee info
4. Test environment target

## OUTPUT FORMAT (JSON ONLY)
Return ONLY valid JSON:
```json
{
  "adminSetupSteps": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "action": "Login as Admin",
      "menu": "/login",
      "details": "Use admin credentials from environment profile"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "action": "Navigate to User Level Control",
      "menu": "Name Config > User Level Setup > User Level Control",
      "details": "Search for or create user level: {userLevelName}"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "action": "Configure User Level",
      "menu": "User Level Control > Config",
      "details": "Set Allow Web Login={allowWeb}, Restricted IP={restrictedIP}, Inactive={inactive}"
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "action": "Assign Menu Permissions",
      "menu": "User Level Control > Access Menu Permission",
      "details": "Add menus: {menuList}"
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "action": "Setup Employee",
      "menu": "Employee > Employee Setup",
      "details": "Find/create employee {employeeCode} ({employeeName}), assign level {userLevelName}"
    }
  ],
  "testExecutionSteps": [
    {
      "id": 6,
      "action": "Logout Admin",
      "verify": "Redirected to login page"
    },
    {
      "id": 7,
      "action": "Login as Test Employee",
      "details": "Login with {employeeCode} credentials",
      "verify": "Check login success/failure",
      "captureScreenshot": true
    },
    {
      "id": 8,
      "action": "Verify Dashboard Access",
      "verify": "Dashboard loads without 404",
      "captureScreenshot": true
    }
  ],
  "evidenceRequired": [
    "User Level Name and config used",
    "Menu permissions assigned",
    "Employee assigned",
    "Login result (pass/fail)",
    "Error messages if any"
  ]
}
```

## RULES
1. NEVER invent field values - use ONLY the data provided by the tester
2. Replace {placeholders} with actual values from the input
3. Include captureScreenshot:true for key verification steps
4. Include captureVideo:true for the full execution flow
5. Keep steps atomic - one action per step
